Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiff Elizabeth Brooks' Verified Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,275.00; Declaration Of Brianda Herrera In Support Thereof
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: RE: DEFENDANT DIAMOND WELLNESS INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff Elizabeth Brooks' Verified Responses To Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $1,275.00.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Brianda Herrera, Esq., of Clausen Miller P.C., 949.260.3100, for Defendant.
No other appearances.

Not argued/contested. At the outset, counsel advises of plaintiff counsel's unavailability to appear today and that she is specially appearing for counsel. The court confirms counsel's request to take the subject matter off calendar. The tentative ruling is withdrawn, and the subject matter is taken off calendar as requested.

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
